problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of BDNF. BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
